cards.front: What is the time complexity of Merge Sort?
What is the time complexity of Quick Sort?
cards.back: O(n log n) on average, O(n^2) in the worst case

cards.front: What is the purpose of the 'root' node in a binary tree?
cards.back: To serve as the starting point for traversal and to connect child nodes

cards.front: What is a key property of integers that makes them suitable for multiplication?
cards.back: Their ability to be represented as binary numbers, allowing for efficient digit-by-digit multiplication

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Strassen’s Matrix Multiplication algorithm?
cards.back: O(n^2.81), which is faster than the O(n^3) complexity of standard matrix multiplication
